summary: Tested Manual Subscription Pricing update (March 2026). All 3 pricing APIs return correct values: ₹999 + 18% GST = ₹1178.82. GST routing logic verified for company wallet split (gst_collection + subscription wallets).
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing functions correctly implement ₹999 + 18% GST = ₹1178.82 formula
All 3 pricing endpoints return consistent values
GST routing logic in credit_company_wallets_for_manual_subscription() correctly splits: GST → gst_collection wallet, Base → subscription wallet
Quarterly/Half-yearly/Yearly plans correctly multiply base pricing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual subscription pricing tested. All APIs working: /api/vip/plans, /api/subscription/plans, /api/subscription/manual-pricing. Pricing: Monthly=₹1178.82 (₹999+18%GST), Quarterly=₹3536.46, Half-yearly=₹7072.92, Yearly=₹14145.84
